docs.title: WickdHub
docs.text: Welcome to the hub. Everything you need — outlines, trackers, research, and summaries — organized and accessible from any device.

docs.title: Quick Navigation
docs.text: Section What's Here Outlines Training outlines, module structures, curriculum maps Trackers Project status, content gaps, implementation progress Research Architecture docs, product intelligence, technical research Summaries User summaries, org directories, profile references

docs.title: Recently Updated
docs.text:
Getting Started

Drop markdown files into any folder under docs/, commit and push — they'll appear here automatically.

docs.title: Outlines
docs.text:
Training outlines, module structures, and curriculum maps.

Add your first outline

Save any .md file to this folder and add it to the nav section in mkdocs.yml. It'll show up here automatically.

docs.title: Example structure for an outline
docs.text:
# Module Title

## Learning Objectives
- Objective 1
- Objective 2

## Topics Covered
1. Topic A
2. Topic B
3. Topic C

## Duration
Estimated: 45 minutes

## Notes
Any additional context or delivery notes.

docs.title: Research
docs.text:
Architecture docs, product intelligence, and technical research.

Add research docs

Drop any .md file here for architecture notes, pipeline documentation, product research, or technical deep-dives.

docs.title: Suggested categories
docs.text:
• Architecture — system diagrams, pipeline flows, integration maps
  • Product Intelligence — competitive research, feature analysis
  • Technical Notes — API references, configuration guides, troubleshooting

docs.title: Summaries
docs.text:
User summaries, org directories, and profile references.

Add a summary

Save any .md file here for user profiles, org charts, insurance references, or directory information.

docs.title: Suggested format for user summaries
docs.text:
# [User/Entity Name]

## Overview
Brief description or role summary.

## Key Details
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Role | — |
| Department | — |
| Location | — |

## Notes
Any relevant context, history, or reference information.
